commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=826b3d658223b1e1938ab07677510cef5caabea7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Slack and Telegram plugin interactive callback dispatch to compute `ctx.auth.isAuthorizedSender` from command/channel authorization and adds regression tests for allowlisted and non-allowlisted callback senders.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main dispatches Slack and Telegram plugin callbacks with a literal authorized-sender value while the documented command authorization contract is dynamic. I did not run live Slack or Telegram callbacks in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human handling is needed because the external PR lacks contributor-supplied real behavior proof, still needs the changelog entry, has unsettled exact-head checks, and carries the protected `maintainer` label.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
